history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with curly black hair, wearing a black Nike hoodie and black sweatpants with white stitching, leans against a marble-tiled wall in what appears to be a modern restroom. He has a gold cross necklace and a silver watch on his left wrist. A black backpack is slung over his shoulders. His reflection is visible in a large, well-lit mirror behind him, which also shows a glimpse of a bright light fixture above. To his left, a white automatic hand dryer with a green light is mounted on the wall. The overall mood is casual and slightly edgy, with a cool, urban aesthetic. The lighting is bright and somewhat artificial, typical of indoor spaces. The color palette is dominated by black, white, and the muted tones of the marble. The image has a slightly low-angle perspective, emphasizing the subject and his surroundings.
